question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the myocardium (heart muscle), most often caused by viral infection."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心肌炎：心肌（心脏肌肉）的炎症，通常由病毒感染引起。」
explanation_en: myocarditis — Inflammation of the myocardium (heart muscle), most often caused by viral infection.
explanation_zh: myocarditis——心肌炎：心肌（心脏肌肉）的炎症，通常由病毒感染引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Hardening and narrowing of arteries due to the buildup of plaques containing lipids and other substances."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「动脉粥样硬化：动脉内壁因脂质等物质堆积形成斑块，导致动脉管腔变硬变窄。」
explanation_en: atherosclerosis — Hardening and narrowing of arteries due to the buildup of plaques containing lipids and other substances.
explanation_zh: atherosclerosis——动脉粥样硬化：动脉内壁因脂质等物质堆积形成斑块，导致动脉管腔变硬变窄。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally rapid heart rate, typically defined as more than 100 beats per minute in adults."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心动过速：心率异常加快，成人通常定义为每分钟超过100次。」
explanation_en: tachycardia — Abnormally rapid heart rate, typically defined as more than 100 beats per minute in adults.
explanation_zh: tachycardia——心动过速：心率异常加快，成人通常定义为每分钟超过100次。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally slow heart rate, typically defined as fewer than 60 beats per minute in adults."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心动过缓：心率异常减慢，成人通常定义为每分钟低于60次。」
explanation_en: bradycardia — Abnormally slow heart rate, typically defined as fewer than 60 beats per minute in adults.
explanation_zh: bradycardia——心动过缓：心率异常减慢，成人通常定义为每分钟低于60次。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A condition in which the force of blood against artery walls is consistently too high, classified as ≥130/80 mmHg."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高血压：血液对动脉壁的压力持续偏高，通常定义为血压≥130/80 mmHg。」
explanation_en: hypertension — A condition in which the force of blood against artery walls is consistently too high, classified as ≥130/80 mmHg.
explanation_zh: hypertension——高血压：血液对动脉壁的压力持续偏高，通常定义为血压≥130/80 mmHg。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The double-walled fibrous sac that encloses the heart and the roots of the great blood vessels."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心包：包裹心脏和大血管根部的双层纤维囊。」
explanation_en: pericardium — The double-walled fibrous sac that encloses the heart and the roots of the great blood vessels.
explanation_zh: pericardium——心包：包裹心脏和大血管根部的双层纤维囊。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Any irregularity in the rate or rhythm of the heartbeat, including beats that are too fast, too slow, or irregular."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心律失常：心跳频率或节律的任何不规则，包括过快、过慢或不规律。」
explanation_en: arrhythmia — Any irregularity in the rate or rhythm of the heartbeat, including beats that are too fast, too slow, or irregular.
explanation_zh: arrhythmia——心律失常：心跳频率或节律的任何不规则，包括过快、过慢或不规律。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Insufficient blood supply to a tissue or organ, leading to oxygen deprivation and potential tissue damage."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「缺血：某个组织或器官的血液供应不足，导致缺氧和潜在的组织损伤。」
explanation_en: ischemia — Insufficient blood supply to a tissue or organ, leading to oxygen deprivation and potential tissue damage.
explanation_zh: ischemia——缺血：某个组织或器官的血液供应不足，导致缺氧和潜在的组织损伤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A procedure to mechanically widen a narrowed or obstructed blood vessel, typically using a balloon catheter."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血管成形术：通过机械方法扩张狭窄或阻塞的血管，通常使用球囊导管。」
explanation_en: angioplasty — A procedure to mechanically widen a narrowed or obstructed blood vessel, typically using a balloon catheter.
explanation_zh: angioplasty——血管成形术：通过机械方法扩张狭窄或阻塞的血管，通常使用球囊导管。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormal enlargement of the heart, which may be caused by hypertension, heart disease, or other conditions."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心脏肥大：心脏异常增大，可能由高血压、心脏病或其他疾病引起。」
explanation_en: cardiomegaly — Abnormal enlargement of the heart, which may be caused by hypertension, heart disease, or other conditions.
explanation_zh: cardiomegaly——心脏肥大：心脏异常增大，可能由高血压、心脏病或其他疾病引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The iron-containing protein in red blood cells that binds oxygen for transport throughout the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血红蛋白：红细胞中含铁的蛋白质，与氧气结合并将其输送至全身。」
explanation_en: hemoglobin — The iron-containing protein in red blood cells that binds oxygen for transport throughout the body.
explanation_zh: hemoglobin——血红蛋白：红细胞中含铁的蛋白质，与氧气结合并将其输送至全身。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A type of cancer of blood-forming tissues, characterized by the overproduction of abnormal white blood cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「白血病：一种造血组织的癌症，以异常白细胞过度增殖为特征。」
explanation_en: leukemia — A type of cancer of blood-forming tissues, characterized by the overproduction of abnormal white blood cells.
explanation_zh: leukemia——白血病：一种造血组织的癌症，以异常白细胞过度增殖为特征。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An infection that inflames the air sacs (alveoli) in one or both lungs, which may fill with fluid."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺炎：使一侧或两侧肺部肺泡发炎的感染，肺泡可能充满液体。」
explanation_en: pneumonia — An infection that inflames the air sacs (alveoli) in one or both lungs, which may fill with fluid.
explanation_zh: pneumonia——肺炎：使一侧或两侧肺部肺泡发炎的感染，肺泡可能充满液体。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the lining of the bronchial tubes, which carry air to and from the lungs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「支气管炎：连接肺部的支气管黏膜炎症。」
explanation_en: bronchitis — Inflammation of the lining of the bronchial tubes, which carry air to and from the lungs.
explanation_zh: bronchitis——支气管炎：连接肺部的支气管黏膜炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A chronic lung condition in which the alveoli are destroyed and over-inflated, reducing gas exchange capacity."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺气肿：一种慢性肺部疾病，肺泡被破坏并过度充气，导致气体交换能力下降。」
explanation_en: emphysema — A chronic lung condition in which the alveoli are destroyed and over-inflated, reducing gas exchange capacity.
explanation_zh: emphysema——肺气肿：一种慢性肺部疾病，肺泡被破坏并过度充气，导致气体交换能力下降。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Difficult or labored breathing; a subjective sensation of shortness of breath."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「呼吸困难：呼吸费力或窘迫，主观感到气短。」
explanation_en: dyspnea — Difficult or labored breathing; a subjective sensation of shortness of breath.
explanation_zh: dyspnea——呼吸困难：呼吸费力或窘迫，主观感到气短。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The cartilaginous tube, also called the windpipe, that connects the larynx to the bronchi."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「气管：连接喉部与支气管的软骨管道，俗称"风管"。」
explanation_en: trachea — The cartilaginous tube, also called the windpipe, that connects the larynx to the bronchi.
explanation_zh: trachea——气管：连接喉部与支气管的软骨管道，俗称"风管"。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Permanent abnormal widening of the bronchi, causing them to be flabby and scarred."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「支气管扩张症：支气管永久性异常扩张，使其变得松弛并有瘢痕。」
explanation_en: bronchiectasis — Permanent abnormal widening of the bronchi, causing them to be flabby and scarred.
explanation_zh: bronchiectasis——支气管扩张症：支气管永久性异常扩张，使其变得松弛并有瘢痕。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The coughing up of blood or blood-tinged mucus from the lungs or bronchial tubes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「咯血：从肺部或支气管咳出血液或带血黏液。」
explanation_en: hemoptysis — The coughing up of blood or blood-tinged mucus from the lungs or bronchial tubes.
explanation_zh: hemoptysis——咯血：从肺部或支气管咳出血液或带血黏液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Temporary cessation of breathing, often occurring during sleep (sleep apnea)."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「呼吸暂停：呼吸暂时停止，常发生于睡眠中（睡眠呼吸暂停）。」
explanation_en: apnea — Temporary cessation of breathing, often occurring during sleep (sleep apnea).
explanation_zh: apnea——呼吸暂停：呼吸暂时停止，常发生于睡眠中（睡眠呼吸暂停）。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Blue or purple discoloration of the skin and mucous membranes due to insufficient oxygen in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「发绀：血液中氧气不足导致皮肤和黏膜呈蓝紫色。」
explanation_en: cyanosis — Blue or purple discoloration of the skin and mucous membranes due to insufficient oxygen in the blood.
explanation_zh: cyanosis——发绀：血液中氧气不足导致皮肤和黏膜呈蓝紫色。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tiny air sac in the lungs (plural: alveoli) where gas exchange between air and blood takes place."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺泡：肺中的微小气囊（复数：alveoli），是空气与血液进行气体交换的场所。」
explanation_en: alveolus — A tiny air sac in the lungs (plural: alveoli) where gas exchange between air and blood takes place.
explanation_zh: alveolus——肺泡：肺中的微小气囊（复数：alveoli），是空气与血液进行气体交换的场所。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A pulmonary function test that measures the amount of air a person can inhale and exhale, and how quickly."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺活量测定：一种肺功能检查，用于测量吸入和呼出的气体量及速度。」
explanation_en: spirometry — A pulmonary function test that measures the amount of air a person can inhale and exhale, and how quickly.
explanation_zh: spirometry——肺活量测定：一种肺功能检查，用于测量吸入和呼出的气体量及速度。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormal presence of air in the pleural space between the lung and chest wall, causing partial or total lung collapse."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「气胸：肺与胸壁之间的胸膜腔内异常积气，导致肺部部分或完全萎陷。」
explanation_en: pneumothorax — Abnormal presence of air in the pleural space between the lung and chest wall, causing partial or total lung collapse.
explanation_zh: pneumothorax——气胸：肺与胸壁之间的胸膜腔内异常积气，导致肺部部分或完全萎陷。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Sharp, stabbing, or burning pain along the path of a nerve, without apparent structural damage to the nerve."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经痛：沿神经走行出现的剧烈、刺痛或烧灼样疼痛，神经本身无明显结构损伤。」
explanation_en: neuralgia — Sharp, stabbing, or burning pain along the path of a nerve, without apparent structural damage to the nerve.
explanation_zh: neuralgia——神经痛：沿神经走行出现的剧烈、刺痛或烧灼样疼痛，神经本身无明显结构损伤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the brain, typically caused by a viral infection or autoimmune response."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脑炎：大脑的炎症，通常由病毒感染或自身免疫反应引起。」
explanation_en: encephalitis — Inflammation of the brain, typically caused by a viral infection or autoimmune response.
explanation_zh: encephalitis——脑炎：大脑的炎症，通常由病毒感染或自身免疫反应引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the meninges, the membranes that surround the brain and spinal cord."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脑膜炎：包绕脑和脊髓的脑膜发生炎症。」
explanation_en: meningitis — Inflammation of the meninges, the membranes that surround the brain and spinal cord.
explanation_zh: meningitis——脑膜炎：包绕脑和脊髓的脑膜发生炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The long, slender projection of a neuron that conducts electrical impulses away from the cell body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「轴突：神经元的细长突起，负责将电信号从细胞体传向外周。」
explanation_en: axon — The long, slender projection of a neuron that conducts electrical impulses away from the cell body.
explanation_zh: axon——轴突：神经元的细长突起，负责将电信号从细胞体传向外周。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The junction between two neurons where chemical or electrical signals are transmitted."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「突触：两个神经元之间的连接部位，负责传递化学或电信号。」
explanation_en: synapse — The junction between two neurons where chemical or electrical signals are transmitted.
explanation_zh: synapse——突触：两个神经元之间的连接部位，负责传递化学或电信号。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Paralysis of the lower extremities and often the lower trunk, caused by injury or disease of the spinal cord."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「截瘫：因脊髓损伤或疾病引起的下肢（及下躯干）瘫痪。」
explanation_en: paraplegia — Paralysis of the lower extremities and often the lower trunk, caused by injury or disease of the spinal cord.
explanation_zh: paraplegia——截瘫：因脊髓损伤或疾病引起的下肢（及下躯干）瘫痪。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A neurological disorder characterized by recurrent, unprovoked seizures due to abnormal brain electrical activity."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「癫痫：以反复发作的无诱因癫痫发作为特征的神经系统疾病，由大脑异常放电引起。」
explanation_en: epilepsy — A neurological disorder characterized by recurrent, unprovoked seizures due to abnormal brain electrical activity.
explanation_zh: epilepsy——癫痫：以反复发作的无诱因癫痫发作为特征的神经系统疾病，由大脑异常放电引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A disease or dysfunction of one or more peripheral nerves, causing weakness, numbness, or pain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经病变：一条或多条周围神经的疾病或功能障碍，引起无力、麻木或疼痛。」
explanation_en: neuropathy — A disease or dysfunction of one or more peripheral nerves, causing weakness, numbness, or pain.
explanation_zh: neuropathy——神经病变：一条或多条周围神经的疾病或功能障碍，引起无力、麻木或疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A group of symptoms affecting memory, thinking, and social ability severely enough to interfere with daily functioning."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「痴呆症：一组影响记忆、思维和社交能力的症状，严重到影响日常生活功能。」
explanation_en: dementia — A group of symptoms affecting memory, thinking, and social ability severely enough to interfere with daily functioning.
explanation_zh: dementia——痴呆症：一组影响记忆、思维和社交能力的症状，严重到影响日常生活功能。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A fatty, insulating sheath that surrounds the axons of many neurons, dramatically increasing the speed of nerve impulses."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「髓鞘：包绕许多神经元轴突的脂质绝缘鞘，能显著加快神经冲动的传导速度。」
explanation_en: myelin — A fatty, insulating sheath that surrounds the axons of many neurons, dramatically increasing the speed of nerve impulses.
explanation_zh: myelin——髓鞘：包绕许多神经元轴突的脂质绝缘鞘，能显著加快神经冲动的传导速度。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Paralysis of one side of the body, typically caused by a stroke or brain injury."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「偏瘫：身体一侧的瘫痪，通常由脑卒中或脑损伤引起。」
explanation_en: hemiplegia — Paralysis of one side of the body, typically caused by a stroke or brain injury.
explanation_zh: hemiplegia——偏瘫：身体一侧的瘫痪，通常由脑卒中或脑损伤引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The medical specialty concerned with the study and treatment of disorders of the nervous system."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经病学：研究和治疗神经系统疾病的医学专科。」
explanation_en: neurology — The medical specialty concerned with the study and treatment of disorders of the nervous system.
explanation_zh: neurology——神经病学：研究和治疗神经系统疾病的医学专科。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the stomach lining, which can cause nausea, vomiting, and upper abdominal pain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胃炎：胃黏膜炎症，可引起恶心、呕吐和上腹部疼痛。」
explanation_en: gastritis — Inflammation of the stomach lining, which can cause nausea, vomiting, and upper abdominal pain.
explanation_zh: gastritis——胃炎：胃黏膜炎症，可引起恶心、呕吐和上腹部疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the liver, most commonly caused by viral infection (hepatitis A, B, or C) or alcohol use."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肝炎：肝脏炎症，最常由病毒感染（甲、乙、丙型肝炎病毒）或酗酒引起。」
explanation_en: hepatitis — Inflammation of the liver, most commonly caused by viral infection (hepatitis A, B, or C) or alcohol use.
explanation_zh: hepatitis——肝炎：肝脏炎症，最常由病毒感染（甲、乙、丙型肝炎病毒）或酗酒引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Late-stage scarring (fibrosis) of the liver caused by long-term liver damage, impairing liver function."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肝硬化：肝脏长期损伤导致的晚期瘢痕（纤维化），使肝功能受损。」
explanation_en: cirrhosis — Late-stage scarring (fibrosis) of the liver caused by long-term liver damage, impairing liver function.
explanation_zh: cirrhosis——肝硬化：肝脏长期损伤导致的晚期瘢痕（纤维化），使肝功能受损。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the gallbladder, usually caused by gallstones blocking the cystic duct."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胆囊炎：胆囊的炎症，通常由胆结石阻塞胆囊管引起。」
explanation_en: cholecystitis — Inflammation of the gallbladder, usually caused by gallstones blocking the cystic duct.
explanation_zh: cholecystitis——胆囊炎：胆囊的炎症，通常由胆结石阻塞胆囊管引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the appendix, a small finger-shaped pouch attached to the large intestine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「阑尾炎：阑尾的炎症，阑尾是附着于大肠的小指状囊袋。」
explanation_en: appendicitis — Inflammation of the appendix, a small finger-shaped pouch attached to the large intestine.
explanation_zh: appendicitis——阑尾炎：阑尾的炎症，阑尾是附着于大肠的小指状囊袋。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Difficulty swallowing, which may be caused by structural or neurological problems."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「吞咽困难：吞咽时有困难，可由结构性或神经性问题引起。」
explanation_en: dysphagia — Difficulty swallowing, which may be caused by structural or neurological problems.
explanation_zh: dysphagia——吞咽困难：吞咽时有困难，可由结构性或神经性问题引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The wave-like muscular contractions that propel contents through the digestive tract."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「蠕动：推动消化道内容物向前移动的波浪状肌肉收缩运动。」
explanation_en: peristalsis — The wave-like muscular contractions that propel contents through the digestive tract.
explanation_zh: peristalsis——蠕动：推动消化道内容物向前移动的波浪状肌肉收缩运动。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An examination of the inside of the colon using a flexible camera (colonoscope) to detect abnormalities."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「结肠镜检查：使用柔性摄像头（结肠镜）检查结肠内部以发现异常。」
explanation_en: colonoscopy — An examination of the inside of the colon using a flexible camera (colonoscope) to detect abnormalities.
explanation_zh: colonoscopy——结肠镜检查：使用柔性摄像头（结肠镜）检查结肠内部以发现异常。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormal enlargement of the liver beyond its normal size."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肝肿大：肝脏超过正常大小的异常增大。」
explanation_en: hepatomegaly — Abnormal enlargement of the liver beyond its normal size.
explanation_zh: hepatomegaly——肝肿大：肝脏超过正常大小的异常增大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the small intestine, typically causing diarrhea, abdominal cramps, and nausea."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「小肠炎：小肠的炎症，通常引起腹泻、腹部绞痛和恶心。」
explanation_en: enteritis — Inflammation of the small intestine, typically causing diarrhea, abdominal cramps, and nausea.
explanation_zh: enteritis——小肠炎：小肠的炎症，通常引起腹泻、腹部绞痛和恶心。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The medical specialty focused on the digestive system and its disorders."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「消化内科学：专注于消化系统及其疾病的医学专科。」
explanation_en: gastroenterology — The medical specialty focused on the digestive system and its disorders.
explanation_zh: gastroenterology——消化内科学：专注于消化系统及其疾病的医学专科。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A surgical procedure that creates an opening in the abdominal wall, through which the end of the ileum is brought to divert waste."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「回肠造口术：将回肠末端引出至腹壁外开口的外科手术，用于转流粪便。」
explanation_en: ileostomy — A surgical procedure that creates an opening in the abdominal wall, through which the end of the ileum is brought to divert waste.
explanation_zh: ileostomy——回肠造口术：将回肠末端引出至腹壁外开口的外科手术，用于转流粪便。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of one or more joints, causing pain, swelling, stiffness, and reduced range of motion."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「关节炎：一个或多个关节的炎症，引起疼痛、肿胀、僵硬和活动受限。」
explanation_en: arthritis — Inflammation of one or more joints, causing pain, swelling, stiffness, and reduced range of motion.
explanation_zh: arthritis——关节炎：一个或多个关节的炎症，引起疼痛、肿胀、僵硬和活动受限。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A condition characterized by decreased bone density and increased fragility, leading to an elevated fracture risk."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「骨质疏松症：以骨密度降低、骨质变脆为特征的疾病，骨折风险显著升高。」
explanation_en: osteoporosis — A condition characterized by decreased bone density and increased fragility, leading to an elevated fracture risk.
explanation_zh: osteoporosis——骨质疏松症：以骨密度降低、骨质变脆为特征的疾病，骨折风险显著升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a tendon, the fibrous tissue connecting muscle to bone, causing pain near a joint."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「腱炎：连接肌肉与骨骼的腱（肌腱）发炎，在关节附近引起疼痛。」
explanation_en: tendinitis — Inflammation of a tendon, the fibrous tissue connecting muscle to bone, causing pain near a joint.
explanation_zh: tendinitis——腱炎：连接肌肉与骨骼的腱（肌腱）发炎，在关节附近引起疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Any disease of muscle tissue, characterized by muscle weakness and may affect muscle structure and function."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肌病：肌肉组织的任何疾病，以肌无力为特征，可影响肌肉结构和功能。」
explanation_en: myopathy — Any disease of muscle tissue, characterized by muscle weakness and may affect muscle structure and function.
explanation_zh: myopathy——肌病：肌肉组织的任何疾病，以肌无力为特征，可影响肌肉结构和功能。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A degenerative joint disease in which the cartilage that cushions the ends of bones wears down over time."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「骨关节炎：一种退行性关节疾病，关节端保护软骨随时间逐渐磨损。」
explanation_en: osteoarthritis — A degenerative joint disease in which the cartilage that cushions the ends of bones wears down over time.
explanation_zh: osteoarthritis——骨关节炎：一种退行性关节疾病，关节端保护软骨随时间逐渐磨损。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormal lateral curvature of the spine, most often diagnosed during growth spurts before puberty."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脊柱侧凸：脊柱异常的侧弯，最常在青春期前的快速生长阶段被诊断。」
explanation_en: scoliosis — An abnormal lateral curvature of the spine, most often diagnosed during growth spurts before puberty.
explanation_zh: scoliosis——脊柱侧凸：脊柱异常的侧弯，最常在青春期前的快速生长阶段被诊断。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a bursa, a small fluid-filled sac that cushions bones, tendons, and muscles near joints."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「滑囊炎：滑囊的炎症，滑囊是关节附近缓冲骨骼、肌腱和肌肉的小型液囊。」
explanation_en: bursitis — Inflammation of a bursa, a small fluid-filled sac that cushions bones, tendons, and muscles near joints.
explanation_zh: bursitis——滑囊炎：滑囊的炎症，滑囊是关节附近缓冲骨骼、肌腱和肌肉的小型液囊。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A firm, flexible connective tissue found in joints, the outer ear, nose, and other structures."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「软骨：一种坚韧而有弹性的结缔组织，存在于关节、外耳、鼻子及其他结构中。」
explanation_en: cartilage — A firm, flexible connective tissue found in joints, the outer ear, nose, and other structures.
explanation_zh: cartilage——软骨：一种坚韧而有弹性的结缔组织，存在于关节、外耳、鼻子及其他结构中。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Wasting away or decrease in size of a body part, organ, or tissue due to disease, injury, or lack of use."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「萎缩：因疾病、损伤或废用导致身体部位、器官或组织消瘦或缩小。」
explanation_en: atrophy — Wasting away or decrease in size of a body part, organ, or tissue due to disease, injury, or lack of use.
explanation_zh: atrophy——萎缩：因疾病、损伤或废用导致身体部位、器官或组织消瘦或缩小。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A minimally invasive surgical procedure for diagnosing and treating joint problems using a small camera (arthroscope)."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「关节镜检查：使用小型摄像头（关节镜）诊断和治疗关节问题的微创手术。」
explanation_en: arthroscopy — A minimally invasive surgical procedure for diagnosing and treating joint problems using a small camera (arthroscope).
explanation_zh: arthroscopy——关节镜检查：使用小型摄像头（关节镜）诊断和治疗关节问题的微创手术。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A benign (non-cancerous) tumor composed of mature bone tissue."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「骨瘤：由成熟骨组织构成的良性（非癌性）肿瘤。」
explanation_en: osteoma — A benign (non-cancerous) tumor composed of mature bone tissue.
explanation_zh: osteoma——骨瘤：由成熟骨组织构成的良性（非癌性）肿瘤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Resembling rheumatism; specifically used in 'rheumatoid arthritis,' an autoimmune inflammatory joint disease."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「类风湿性的：与风湿相似；特指"类风湿性关节炎"，一种自身免疫性炎症性关节病。」
explanation_en: rheumatoid — Resembling rheumatism; specifically used in 'rheumatoid arthritis,' an autoimmune inflammatory joint disease.
explanation_zh: rheumatoid——类风湿性的：与风湿相似；特指"类风湿性关节炎"，一种自身免疫性炎症性关节病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A metabolic disease in which the body cannot properly regulate blood glucose, either due to insufficient insulin or insulin resistance."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「糖尿病：机体无法正常调控血糖的代谢性疾病，原因是胰岛素不足或胰岛素抵抗。」
explanation_en: diabetes — A metabolic disease in which the body cannot properly regulate blood glucose, either due to insufficient insulin or insulin resistance.
explanation_zh: diabetes——糖尿病：机体无法正常调控血糖的代谢性疾病，原因是胰岛素不足或胰岛素抵抗。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A condition in which the thyroid gland produces too much thyroid hormone, accelerating many body functions."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺功能亢进：甲状腺分泌过多甲状腺激素，使机体许多功能加速的疾病。」
explanation_en: hyperthyroidism — A condition in which the thyroid gland produces too much thyroid hormone, accelerating many body functions.
explanation_zh: hyperthyroidism——甲状腺功能亢进：甲状腺分泌过多甲状腺激素，使机体许多功能加速的疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A condition in which the thyroid gland does not produce enough thyroid hormone, slowing many body functions."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺功能减退：甲状腺分泌的甲状腺激素不足，使机体许多功能减慢的疾病。」
explanation_en: hypothyroidism — A condition in which the thyroid gland does not produce enough thyroid hormone, slowing many body functions.
explanation_zh: hypothyroidism——甲状腺功能减退：甲状腺分泌的甲状腺激素不足，使机体许多功能减慢的疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A hormone produced by the beta cells of the pancreas that regulates the uptake of glucose from the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胰岛素：由胰腺β细胞产生的激素，调节血液中葡萄糖的摄取。」
explanation_en: insulin — A hormone produced by the beta cells of the pancreas that regulates the uptake of glucose from the blood.
explanation_zh: insulin——胰岛素：由胰腺β细胞产生的激素，调节血液中葡萄糖的摄取。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally high blood glucose level, a hallmark of poorly controlled diabetes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高血糖：血糖水平异常升高，是糖尿病控制不佳的标志。」
explanation_en: hyperglycemia — Abnormally high blood glucose level, a hallmark of poorly controlled diabetes.
explanation_zh: hyperglycemia——高血糖：血糖水平异常升高，是糖尿病控制不佳的标志。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally low blood glucose level, which can cause shakiness, confusion, and in severe cases, loss of consciousness."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「低血糖：血糖水平异常降低，可引起颤抖、意识模糊，严重时可致失去意识。」
explanation_en: hypoglycemia — Abnormally low blood glucose level, which can cause shakiness, confusion, and in severe cases, loss of consciousness.
explanation_zh: hypoglycemia——低血糖：血糖水平异常降低，可引起颤抖、意识模糊，严重时可致失去意识。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the thyroid gland, which can cause temporary hyperthyroidism followed by hypothyroidism."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺炎：甲状腺的炎症，可先引起暂时性甲亢，后出现甲减。」
explanation_en: thyroiditis — Inflammation of the thyroid gland, which can cause temporary hyperthyroidism followed by hypothyroidism.
explanation_zh: thyroiditis——甲状腺炎：甲状腺的炎症，可先引起暂时性甲亢，后出现甲减。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A steroid hormone released by the adrenal cortex in response to stress; it regulates metabolism, inflammation, and the immune response."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「皮质醇：肾上腺皮质在应激反应下分泌的类固醇激素，调节代谢、炎症和免疫反应。」
explanation_en: cortisol — A steroid hormone released by the adrenal cortex in response to stress; it regulates metabolism, inflammation, and the immune response.
explanation_zh: cortisol——皮质醇：肾上腺皮质在应激反应下分泌的类固醇激素，调节代谢、炎症和免疫反应。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The medical specialty dealing with the endocrine system, including hormones and their associated glands and disorders."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「内分泌学：研究内分泌系统（包括激素及其相关腺体和疾病）的医学专科。」
explanation_en: endocrinology — The medical specialty dealing with the endocrine system, including hormones and their associated glands and disorders.
explanation_zh: endocrinology——内分泌学：研究内分泌系统（包括激素及其相关腺体和疾病）的医学专科。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to the adrenal glands, which sit atop the kidneys and produce hormones such as cortisol, aldosterone, and adrenaline."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾上腺的：与肾上腺相关，肾上腺位于肾脏上方，产生皮质醇、醛固酮和肾上腺素等激素。」
explanation_en: adrenal — Relating to the adrenal glands, which sit atop the kidneys and produce hormones such as cortisol, aldosterone, and adrenaline.
explanation_zh: adrenal——肾上腺的：与肾上腺相关，肾上腺位于肾脏上方，产生皮质醇、醛固酮和肾上腺素等激素。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A condition characterized by an abnormally elevated number of red blood cells, thickening the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「红细胞增多症：红细胞数量异常升高、使血液变稠的状态。」
explanation_en: polycythemia — A condition characterized by an abnormally elevated number of red blood cells, thickening the blood.
explanation_zh: polycythemia——红细胞增多症：红细胞数量异常升高、使血液变稠的状态。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A benign tumor of epithelial tissue that has glandular origin or characteristics."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「腺瘤：起源于腺体上皮组织的良性肿瘤，具有腺体特征。」
explanation_en: adenoma — A benign tumor of epithelial tissue that has glandular origin or characteristics.
explanation_zh: adenoma——腺瘤：起源于腺体上皮组织的良性肿瘤，具有腺体特征。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the kidneys, which can impair their ability to filter waste and excess fluids."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾炎：肾脏的炎症，可损害肾脏过滤废物和多余液体的功能。」
explanation_en: nephritis — Inflammation of the kidneys, which can impair their ability to filter waste and excess fluids.
explanation_zh: nephritis——肾炎：肾脏的炎症，可损害肾脏过滤废物和多余液体的功能。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Presence of blood in the urine, which may be visible (gross) or detectable only by urinalysis (microscopic)."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血尿：尿液中含有血液，可肉眼可见（肉眼血尿）或仅在尿液分析中发现（镜下血尿）。」
explanation_en: hematuria — Presence of blood in the urine, which may be visible (gross) or detectable only by urinalysis (microscopic).
explanation_zh: hematuria——血尿：尿液中含有血液，可肉眼可见（肉眼血尿）或仅在尿液分析中发现（镜下血尿）。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Physical, chemical, and microscopic examination of urine, used to detect a wide range of conditions."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿液分析：对尿液进行物理、化学和显微镜检查，用于检测多种疾病。」
explanation_en: urinalysis — Physical, chemical, and microscopic examination of urine, used to detect a wide range of conditions.
explanation_zh: urinalysis——尿液分析：对尿液进行物理、化学和显微镜检查，用于检测多种疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the bladder, most commonly caused by bacterial infection (urinary tract infection)."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱炎：膀胱的炎症，最常由细菌感染（尿路感染）引起。」
explanation_en: cystitis — Inflammation of the bladder, most commonly caused by bacterial infection (urinary tract infection).
explanation_zh: cystitis——膀胱炎：膀胱的炎症，最常由细菌感染（尿路感染）引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormal presence of protein (especially albumin) in the urine, typically indicating kidney damage."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「蛋白尿：尿液中异常含有蛋白质（尤其是白蛋白），通常提示肾脏损伤。」
explanation_en: proteinuria — Abnormal presence of protein (especially albumin) in the urine, typically indicating kidney damage.
explanation_zh: proteinuria——蛋白尿：尿液中异常含有蛋白质（尤其是白蛋白），通常提示肾脏损伤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the glomeruli, the tiny filtering units within the kidneys."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾小球肾炎：肾脏内微小过滤单位（肾小球）的炎症。」
explanation_en: glomerulonephritis — Inflammation of the glomeruli, the tiny filtering units within the kidneys.
explanation_zh: glomerulonephritis——肾小球肾炎：肾脏内微小过滤单位（肾小球）的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A procedure that removes waste products and excess fluid from the blood when the kidneys fail to do so."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「透析：当肾脏功能衰竭时，通过人工方法清除血液中废物和多余液体的治疗。」
explanation_en: dialysis — A procedure that removes waste products and excess fluid from the blood when the kidneys fail to do so.
explanation_zh: dialysis——透析：当肾脏功能衰竭时，通过人工方法清除血液中废物和多余液体的治疗。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Distension of the renal pelvis due to urine accumulation from an obstruction in the urinary tract."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾积水：因泌尿道梗阻导致尿液积聚，引起肾盂扩张。」
explanation_en: hydronephrosis — Distension of the renal pelvis due to urine accumulation from an obstruction in the urinary tract.
explanation_zh: hydronephrosis——肾积水：因泌尿道梗阻导致尿液积聚，引起肾盂扩张。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The formation of stones (calculi) in the urinary tract, including the kidneys, ureters, or bladder."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「泌尿系结石：在泌尿道（包括肾脏、输尿管或膀胱）内形成结石（钙化物）。」
explanation_en: urolithiasis — The formation of stones (calculi) in the urinary tract, including the kidneys, ureters, or bladder.
explanation_zh: urolithiasis——泌尿系结石：在泌尿道（包括肾脏、输尿管或膀胱）内形成结石（钙化物）。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of a kidney, performed for kidney cancer, severe infection, or to obtain an organ for transplantation."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾切除术：手术切除肾脏，用于治疗肾癌、严重感染或获取器官进行移植。」
explanation_en: nephrectomy — Surgical removal of a kidney, performed for kidney cancer, severe infection, or to obtain an organ for transplantation.
explanation_zh: nephrectomy——肾切除术：手术切除肾脏，用于治疗肾癌、严重感染或获取器官进行移植。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Accumulation of toxic waste products in the blood due to kidney failure, causing a range of serious symptoms."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿毒症：因肾衰竭导致有毒废物在血液中积聚，引起一系列严重症状。」
explanation_en: uremia — Accumulation of toxic waste products in the blood due to kidney failure, causing a range of serious symptoms.
explanation_zh: uremia——尿毒症：因肾衰竭导致有毒废物在血液中积聚，引起一系列严重症状。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Examination of the inside of the bladder and urethra using a thin, flexible camera (cystoscope)."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱镜检查：使用细软摄像头（膀胱镜）检查膀胱和尿道内部。」
explanation_en: cystoscopy — Examination of the inside of the bladder and urethra using a thin, flexible camera (cystoscope).
explanation_zh: cystoscopy——膀胱镜检查：使用细软摄像头（膀胱镜）检查膀胱和尿道内部。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the skin characterized by itching, redness, and a rash; includes eczema and contact dermatitis."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「皮炎：皮肤炎症，以瘙痒、发红和皮疹为特征，包括湿疹和接触性皮炎。」
explanation_en: dermatitis — Inflammation of the skin characterized by itching, redness, and a rash; includes eczema and contact dermatitis.
explanation_zh: dermatitis——皮炎：皮肤炎症，以瘙痒、发红和皮疹为特征，包括湿疹和接触性皮炎。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A malignant tumor that develops from melanocytes (pigment-producing cells), most commonly in the skin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「黑色素瘤：由黑色素细胞（产生色素的细胞）发展而来的恶性肿瘤，最常见于皮肤。」
explanation_en: melanoma — A malignant tumor that develops from melanocytes (pigment-producing cells), most commonly in the skin.
explanation_zh: melanoma——黑色素瘤：由黑色素细胞（产生色素的细胞）发展而来的恶性肿瘤，最常见于皮肤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A chronic autoimmune skin condition causing rapid skin cell buildup, resulting in scaly, itchy patches."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「银屑病（牛皮癣）：一种慢性自身免疫性皮肤病，导致皮肤细胞快速堆积，形成鳞状瘙痒斑块。」
explanation_en: psoriasis — A chronic autoimmune skin condition causing rapid skin cell buildup, resulting in scaly, itchy patches.
explanation_zh: psoriasis——银屑病（牛皮癣）：一种慢性自身免疫性皮肤病，导致皮肤细胞快速堆积，形成鳞状瘙痒斑块。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A condition that makes the skin red, inflamed, and itchy, often triggered by environmental or allergic factors."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「湿疹：使皮肤发红、发炎和瘙痒的疾病，常由环境或过敏因素诱发。」
explanation_en: eczema — A condition that makes the skin red, inflamed, and itchy, often triggered by environmental or allergic factors.
explanation_zh: eczema——湿疹：使皮肤发红、发炎和瘙痒的疾病，常由环境或过敏因素诱发。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Redness of the skin caused by dilation of superficial blood vessels, often in response to infection or irritation."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「红斑：因表浅血管扩张引起的皮肤发红，常为感染或刺激的反应。」
explanation_en: erythema — Redness of the skin caused by dilation of superficial blood vessels, often in response to infection or irritation.
explanation_zh: erythema——红斑：因表浅血管扩张引起的皮肤发红，常为感染或刺激的反应。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The outermost layer of the skin, acting as a protective barrier against the environment."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「表皮：皮肤最外层，作为抵御外界环境的保护屏障。」
explanation_en: epidermis — The outermost layer of the skin, acting as a protective barrier against the environment.
explanation_zh: epidermis——表皮：皮肤最外层，作为抵御外界环境的保护屏障。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The medical specialty concerned with the diagnosis and treatment of skin, hair, and nail disorders."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「皮肤科学：研究和治疗皮肤、毛发和指甲疾病的医学专科。」
explanation_en: dermatology — The medical specialty concerned with the diagnosis and treatment of skin, hair, and nail disorders.
explanation_zh: dermatology——皮肤科学：研究和治疗皮肤、毛发和指甲疾病的医学专科。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A bacterial skin infection causing redness, swelling, warmth, and tenderness, typically of the lower leg."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「蜂窝织炎：细菌性皮肤感染，引起发红、肿胀、发热和压痛，多见于小腿。」
explanation_en: cellulitis — A bacterial skin infection causing redness, swelling, warmth, and tenderness, typically of the lower leg.
explanation_zh: cellulitis——蜂窝织炎：细菌性皮肤感染，引起发红、肿胀、发热和压痛，多见于小腿。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to sebum-secreting glands in the skin; sebaceous glands produce oil that lubricates skin and hair."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「皮脂腺的：与皮肤中分泌皮脂的腺体相关；皮脂腺产生润滑皮肤和毛发的油脂。」
explanation_en: sebaceous — Relating to sebum-secreting glands in the skin; sebaceous glands produce oil that lubricates skin and hair.
explanation_zh: sebaceous——皮脂腺的：与皮肤中分泌皮脂的腺体相关；皮脂腺产生润滑皮肤和毛发的油脂。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A benign epithelial tumor projecting from the surrounding surface, often caused by human papillomavirus (HPV)."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「乳头状瘤：从周围表面突出的良性上皮肿瘤，常由人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）引起。」
explanation_en: papilloma — A benign epithelial tumor projecting from the surrounding surface, often caused by human papillomavirus (HPV).
explanation_zh: papilloma——乳头状瘤：从周围表面突出的良性上皮肿瘤，常由人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A general term for any disease or abnormal condition of the skin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「皮肤病：皮肤任何疾病或异常状态的统称。」
explanation_en: dermatosis — A general term for any disease or abnormal condition of the skin.
explanation_zh: dermatosis——皮肤病：皮肤任何疾病或异常状态的统称。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A malignant tumor arising from epithelial cells, the most common type of cancer."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「癌：起源于上皮细胞的恶性肿瘤，是最常见的癌症类型。」
explanation_en: carcinoma — A malignant tumor arising from epithelial cells, the most common type of cancer.
explanation_zh: carcinoma——癌：起源于上皮细胞的恶性肿瘤，是最常见的癌症类型。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The scientific study of disease, especially the structural and functional changes caused by disease in the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「病理学：研究疾病的科学，尤其是疾病在体内引起的结构和功能变化。」
explanation_en: pathology — The scientific study of disease, especially the structural and functional changes caused by disease in the body.
explanation_zh: pathology——病理学：研究疾病的科学，尤其是疾病在体内引起的结构和功能变化。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The study of cells, their structure, function, and chemistry, especially in the context of disease diagnosis."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞学：研究细胞的结构、功能和化学特性的学科，尤用于疾病诊断。」
explanation_en: cytology — The study of cells, their structure, function, and chemistry, especially in the context of disease diagnosis.
explanation_zh: cytology——细胞学：研究细胞的结构、功能和化学特性的学科，尤用于疾病诊断。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A red blood cell; the biconcave disc-shaped cell containing hemoglobin that transports oxygen in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「红细胞：双凹盘状的红色血细胞，含有血红蛋白，负责在血液中运输氧气。」
explanation_en: erythrocyte — A red blood cell; the biconcave disc-shaped cell containing hemoglobin that transports oxygen in the blood.
explanation_zh: erythrocyte——红细胞：双凹盘状的红色血细胞，含有血红蛋白，负责在血液中运输氧气。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The medical specialty focused on the study, diagnosis, and treatment of cancer."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肿瘤学：专注于癌症研究、诊断和治疗的医学专科。」
explanation_en: oncology — The medical specialty focused on the study, diagnosis, and treatment of cancer.
explanation_zh: oncology——肿瘤学：专注于癌症研究、诊断和治疗的医学专科。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Chest pain caused by reduced blood flow to the heart muscle."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心绞痛：因心肌供血减少引起的胸痛。」
explanation_en: angina — Chest pain caused by reduced blood flow to the heart muscle.
explanation_zh: angina——心绞痛：因心肌供血减少引起的胸痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Tissue death (necrosis) caused by a sudden loss of blood supply."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「梗死：因血供突然中断导致的组织坏死。」
explanation_en: infarction — Tissue death (necrosis) caused by a sudden loss of blood supply.
explanation_zh: infarction——梗死：因血供突然中断导致的组织坏死。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The formation of a blood clot (thrombus) inside a blood vessel."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血栓形成：血管内形成血凝块（血栓）。」
explanation_en: thrombosis — The formation of a blood clot (thrombus) inside a blood vessel.
explanation_zh: thrombosis——血栓形成：血管内形成血凝块（血栓）。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Blockage of a vessel by a clot or other material carried in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「栓塞：血液带来的血栓或其他物质阻塞血管。」
explanation_en: embolism — Blockage of a vessel by a clot or other material carried in the blood.
explanation_zh: embolism——栓塞：血液带来的血栓或其他物质阻塞血管。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormal bulge in the wall of a weakened artery."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「动脉瘤：动脉壁薄弱处的异常膨出。」
explanation_en: aneurysm — An abnormal bulge in the wall of a weakened artery.
explanation_zh: aneurysm——动脉瘤：动脉壁薄弱处的异常膨出。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the inner lining of the heart and its valves."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心内膜炎：心脏内膜及瓣膜的炎症。」
explanation_en: endocarditis — Inflammation of the inner lining of the heart and its valves.
explanation_zh: endocarditis——心内膜炎：心脏内膜及瓣膜的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the pericardium, the sac surrounding the heart."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心包炎：包绕心脏的心包的炎症。」
explanation_en: pericarditis — Inflammation of the pericardium, the sac surrounding the heart.
explanation_zh: pericarditis——心包炎：包绕心脏的心包的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Disease of the heart muscle that impairs its ability to pump blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心肌病：损害心脏泵血能力的心肌疾病。」
explanation_en: cardiomyopathy — Disease of the heart muscle that impairs its ability to pump blood.
explanation_zh: cardiomyopathy——心肌病：损害心脏泵血能力的心肌疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally low blood pressure."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「低血压：血压异常偏低。」
explanation_en: hypotension — Abnormally low blood pressure.
explanation_zh: hypotension——低血压：血压异常偏低。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A sensation of a rapid, strong, or irregular heartbeat."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心悸：感到心跳过快、过强或不规则。」
explanation_en: palpitation — A sensation of a rapid, strong, or irregular heartbeat.
explanation_zh: palpitation——心悸：感到心跳过快、过强或不规则。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Rapid, disorganized contraction of heart muscle fibers."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「颤动：心肌纤维快速而无序的收缩。」
explanation_en: fibrillation — Rapid, disorganized contraction of heart muscle fibers.
explanation_zh: fibrillation——颤动：心肌纤维快速而无序的收缩。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Widening of blood vessels, which lowers blood pressure."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血管扩张：血管口径增大，使血压下降。」
explanation_en: vasodilation — Widening of blood vessels, which lowers blood pressure.
explanation_zh: vasodilation——血管扩张：血管口径增大，使血压下降。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Narrowing of blood vessels, which raises blood pressure."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血管收缩：血管口径变窄，使血压升高。」
explanation_en: vasoconstriction — Narrowing of blood vessels, which raises blood pressure.
explanation_zh: vasoconstriction——血管收缩：血管口径变窄，使血压升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally high levels of lipids (fats) in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高脂血症：血中脂质（脂肪）水平异常升高。」
explanation_en: hyperlipidemia — Abnormally high levels of lipids (fats) in the blood.
explanation_zh: hyperlipidemia——高脂血症：血中脂质（脂肪）水平异常升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a vein."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「静脉炎：静脉的炎症。」
explanation_en: phlebitis — Inflammation of a vein.
explanation_zh: phlebitis——静脉炎：静脉的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a vein associated with a blood clot."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血栓性静脉炎：伴有血栓的静脉炎症。」
explanation_en: thrombophlebitis — Inflammation of a vein associated with a blood clot.
explanation_zh: thrombophlebitis——血栓性静脉炎：伴有血栓的静脉炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Swelling caused by excess fluid trapped in body tissues."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「水肿：体液在组织中潴留过多引起的肿胀。」
explanation_en: edema — Swelling caused by excess fluid trapped in body tissues.
explanation_zh: edema——水肿：体液在组织中潴留过多引起的肿胀。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormal sound heard during the heartbeat, often from turbulent blood flow."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心脏杂音：心跳时听到的异常声音，常因血流湍急所致。」
explanation_en: murmur — An abnormal sound heard during the heartbeat, often from turbulent blood flow.
explanation_zh: murmur——心脏杂音：心跳时听到的异常声音，常因血流湍急所致。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The phase of the heartbeat when the ventricles contract and eject blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「收缩期：心室收缩并射出血液的心跳阶段。」
explanation_en: systole — The phase of the heartbeat when the ventricles contract and eject blood.
explanation_zh: systole——收缩期：心室收缩并射出血液的心跳阶段。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The phase of the heartbeat when the heart relaxes and fills with blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「舒张期：心脏舒张并充盈血液的心跳阶段。」
explanation_en: diastole — The phase of the heartbeat when the heart relaxes and fills with blood.
explanation_zh: diastole——舒张期：心脏舒张并充盈血液的心跳阶段。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A recording of the electrical activity of the heart (ECG/EKG)."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心电图：记录心脏电活动的图形（ECG/EKG）。」
explanation_en: electrocardiogram — A recording of the electrical activity of the heart (ECG/EKG).
explanation_zh: electrocardiogram——心电图：记录心脏电活动的图形（ECG/EKG）。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Imaging of the heart using ultrasound waves."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「超声心动图：用超声波对心脏成像的检查。」
explanation_en: echocardiography — Imaging of the heart using ultrasound waves.
explanation_zh: echocardiography——超声心动图：用超声波对心脏成像的检查。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Imaging of blood vessels using a contrast dye."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血管造影：用造影剂对血管成像的检查。」
explanation_en: angiography — Imaging of blood vessels using a contrast dye.
explanation_zh: angiography——血管造影：用造影剂对血管成像的检查。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to the arteries that supply the heart muscle."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「冠状的：与供应心肌的动脉有关。」
explanation_en: coronary — Relating to the arteries that supply the heart muscle.
explanation_zh: coronary——冠状的：与供应心肌的动脉有关。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The largest artery, carrying blood from the heart to the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「主动脉：人体最大的动脉，将血液从心脏输送到全身。」
explanation_en: aorta — The largest artery, carrying blood from the heart to the body.
explanation_zh: aorta——主动脉：人体最大的动脉，将血液从心脏输送到全身。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "One of the two lower pumping chambers of the heart."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心室：心脏下部两个泵血腔之一。」
explanation_en: ventricle — One of the two lower pumping chambers of the heart.
explanation_zh: ventricle——心室：心脏下部两个泵血腔之一。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "One of the two upper receiving chambers of the heart."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心房：心脏上部两个接收血液的腔之一。」
explanation_en: atrium — One of the two upper receiving chambers of the heart.
explanation_zh: atrium——心房：心脏上部两个接收血液的腔之一。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process that stops bleeding, including clot formation."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「止血：使出血停止的过程，包括血凝块形成。」
explanation_en: hemostasis — The process that stops bleeding, including clot formation.
explanation_zh: hemostasis——止血：使出血停止的过程，包括血凝块形成。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A drug that prevents or slows the clotting of blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「抗凝剂：预防或减缓血液凝固的药物。」
explanation_en: anticoagulant — A drug that prevents or slows the clotting of blood.
explanation_zh: anticoagulant——抗凝剂：预防或减缓血液凝固的药物。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormally fast and irregular heart rhythm."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「快速性心律失常：心率异常增快且不规则。」
explanation_en: tachyarrhythmia — An abnormally fast and irregular heart rhythm.
explanation_zh: tachyarrhythmia——快速性心律失常：心率异常增快且不规则。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The branch of medicine dealing with the heart."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心脏病学：研究心脏的医学分支。」
explanation_en: cardiology — The branch of medicine dealing with the heart.
explanation_zh: cardiology——心脏病学：研究心脏的医学分支。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A benign tumor made of blood or lymph vessels."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血管瘤：由血管或淋巴管构成的良性肿瘤。」
explanation_en: angioma — A benign tumor made of blood or lymph vessels.
explanation_zh: angioma——血管瘤：由血管或淋巴管构成的良性肿瘤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Thickening and hardening of the walls of arteries."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「动脉硬化：动脉壁增厚变硬。」
explanation_en: arteriosclerosis — Thickening and hardening of the walls of arteries.
explanation_zh: arteriosclerosis——动脉硬化：动脉壁增厚变硬。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Sudden loss of heart function, breathing, and consciousness."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「心搏骤停：心脏功能、呼吸和意识突然丧失。」
explanation_en: cardiac arrest — Sudden loss of heart function, breathing, and consciousness.
explanation_zh: cardiac arrest——心搏骤停：心脏功能、呼吸和意识突然丧失。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Sudden tightening of the muscles around the bronchi, narrowing the airways."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「支气管痉挛：支气管周围肌肉突然收缩，使气道变窄。」
explanation_en: bronchospasm — Sudden tightening of the muscles around the bronchi, narrowing the airways.
explanation_zh: bronchospasm——支气管痉挛：支气管周围肌肉突然收缩，使气道变窄。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Visual examination of the airways using a flexible scope."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「支气管镜检查：用软镜观察气道。」
explanation_en: bronchoscopy — Visual examination of the airways using a flexible scope.
explanation_zh: bronchoscopy——支气管镜检查：用软镜观察气道。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A drug that relaxes and widens the airways."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「支气管扩张剂：松弛并扩张气道的药物。」
explanation_en: bronchodilator — A drug that relaxes and widens the airways.
explanation_zh: bronchodilator——支气管扩张剂：松弛并扩张气道的药物。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the larynx (voice box), often causing hoarseness."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「喉炎：喉（发声器官）的炎症，常引起声音嘶哑。」
explanation_en: laryngitis — Inflammation of the larynx (voice box), often causing hoarseness.
explanation_zh: laryngitis——喉炎：喉（发声器官）的炎症，常引起声音嘶哑。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the pharynx (throat); a sore throat."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「咽炎：咽部的炎症，即咽喉痛。」
explanation_en: pharyngitis — Inflammation of the pharynx (throat); a sore throat.
explanation_zh: pharyngitis——咽炎：咽部的炎症，即咽喉痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the lining of the nose."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「鼻炎：鼻黏膜的炎症。」
explanation_en: rhinitis — Inflammation of the lining of the nose.
explanation_zh: rhinitis——鼻炎：鼻黏膜的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A persistent watery discharge from the nose; a runny nose."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「鼻溢液：持续的清水样鼻涕；流涕。」
explanation_en: rhinorrhea — A persistent watery discharge from the nose; a runny nose.
explanation_zh: rhinorrhea——鼻溢液：持续的清水样鼻涕；流涕。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A surgical opening created in the trachea to aid breathing."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「气管造口术：在气管上造口以辅助呼吸。」
explanation_en: tracheostomy — A surgical opening created in the trachea to aid breathing.
explanation_zh: tracheostomy——气管造口术：在气管上造口以辅助呼吸。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical incision into the chest wall."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「开胸术：切开胸壁的手术。」
explanation_en: thoracotomy — Surgical incision into the chest wall.
explanation_zh: thoracotomy——开胸术：切开胸壁的手术。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Removal of fluid from the pleural space with a needle."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胸腔穿刺术：用针抽出胸膜腔积液。」
explanation_en: thoracentesis — Removal of fluid from the pleural space with a needle.
explanation_zh: thoracentesis——胸腔穿刺术：用针抽出胸膜腔积液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the pleura, causing sharp pain when breathing."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胸膜炎：胸膜的炎症，呼吸时引起尖锐疼痛。」
explanation_en: pleurisy — Inflammation of the pleura, causing sharp pain when breathing.
explanation_zh: pleurisy——胸膜炎：胸膜的炎症，呼吸时引起尖锐疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Buildup of excess fluid between the layers of the pleura."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胸腔积液：胸膜各层之间积聚过多液体。」
explanation_en: pleural effusion — Buildup of excess fluid between the layers of the pleura.
explanation_zh: pleural effusion——胸腔积液：胸膜各层之间积聚过多液体。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A deficiency of oxygen reaching the body's tissues."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「缺氧：到达机体组织的氧气不足。」
explanation_en: hypoxia — A deficiency of oxygen reaching the body's tissues.
explanation_zh: hypoxia——缺氧：到达机体组织的氧气不足。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormally low level of oxygen in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「低氧血症：血液中氧含量异常偏低。」
explanation_en: hypoxemia — An abnormally low level of oxygen in the blood.
explanation_zh: hypoxemia——低氧血症：血液中氧含量异常偏低。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally rapid breathing."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「呼吸急促：异常加快的呼吸。」
explanation_en: tachypnea — Abnormally rapid breathing.
explanation_zh: tachypnea——呼吸急促：异常加快的呼吸。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally slow breathing."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「呼吸过缓：异常减慢的呼吸。」
explanation_en: bradypnea — Abnormally slow breathing.
explanation_zh: bradypnea——呼吸过缓：异常减慢的呼吸。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Shortness of breath that occurs when lying flat."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「端坐呼吸：平躺时出现的呼吸困难。」
explanation_en: orthopnea — Shortness of breath that occurs when lying flat.
explanation_zh: orthopnea——端坐呼吸：平躺时出现的呼吸困难。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Partial or complete collapse of a lung or part of it."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺不张：肺或其一部分的部分或完全塌陷。」
explanation_en: atelectasis — Partial or complete collapse of a lung or part of it.
explanation_zh: atelectasis——肺不张：肺或其一部分的部分或完全塌陷。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A medicine that helps loosen and bring up mucus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「祛痰药：帮助稀释并咳出黏液的药物。」
explanation_en: expectorant — A medicine that helps loosen and bring up mucus.
explanation_zh: expectorant——祛痰药：帮助稀释并咳出黏液的药物。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Mucus coughed up from the lower airways."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「痰：从下气道咳出的黏液。」
explanation_en: sputum — Mucus coughed up from the lower airways.
explanation_zh: sputum——痰：从下气道咳出的黏液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A high-pitched whistling sound made while breathing."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「喘鸣：呼吸时发出的高调哨笛样声音。」
explanation_en: wheeze — A high-pitched whistling sound made while breathing.
explanation_zh: wheeze——喘鸣：呼吸时发出的高调哨笛样声音。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A collection of blood in the pleural cavity."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血胸：胸膜腔内积血。」
explanation_en: hemothorax — A collection of blood in the pleural cavity.
explanation_zh: hemothorax——血胸：胸膜腔内积血。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to the lungs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺的：与肺相关的。」
explanation_en: pulmonary — Relating to the lungs.
explanation_zh: pulmonary——肺的：与肺相关的。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process of breathing and exchanging gases."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「呼吸：呼吸并进行气体交换的过程。」
explanation_en: respiration — The process of breathing and exchanging gases.
explanation_zh: respiration——呼吸：呼吸并进行气体交换的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the alveoli in the lungs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺泡炎：肺泡的炎症。」
explanation_en: alveolitis — Inflammation of the alveoli in the lungs.
explanation_zh: alveolitis——肺泡炎：肺泡的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Bluish discoloration of skin from low blood oxygen."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「发绀：因血氧偏低使皮肤呈青紫色。」
explanation_en: cyanosis (respiratory) — Bluish discoloration of skin from low blood oxygen.
explanation_zh: cyanosis (respiratory)——发绀：因血氧偏低使皮肤呈青紫色。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Difficult or labored breathing, especially on exertion."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「劳力性呼吸困难：呼吸费力，尤其在用力时。」
explanation_en: dyspnea (exertional) — Difficult or labored breathing, especially on exertion.
explanation_zh: dyspnea (exertional)——劳力性呼吸困难：呼吸费力，尤其在用力时。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A temporary pause in breathing, as in sleep apnea."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「睡眠呼吸暂停：呼吸的暂时停止，如睡眠呼吸暂停。」
explanation_en: apnea (sleep) — A temporary pause in breathing, as in sleep apnea.
explanation_zh: apnea (sleep)——睡眠呼吸暂停：呼吸的暂时停止，如睡眠呼吸暂停。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A device that turns liquid medicine into a fine mist for inhaling."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「雾化器：将液体药物变成细雾以供吸入的装置。」
explanation_en: nebulizer — A device that turns liquid medicine into a fine mist for inhaling.
explanation_zh: nebulizer——雾化器：将液体药物变成细雾以供吸入的装置。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of lung tissue not caused by infection."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肺炎症（非感染性）：非感染引起的肺组织炎症。」
explanation_en: pneumonitis — Inflammation of lung tissue not caused by infection.
explanation_zh: pneumonitis——肺炎症（非感染性）：非感染引起的肺组织炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A contagious bacterial infection that mainly affects the lungs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「结核病：主要侵犯肺部的传染性细菌感染。」
explanation_en: tuberculosis — A contagious bacterial infection that mainly affects the lungs.
explanation_zh: tuberculosis——结核病：主要侵犯肺部的传染性细菌感染。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Breathing that is faster or deeper than the body needs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「过度通气：呼吸频率或深度超过机体所需。」
explanation_en: hyperventilation — Breathing that is faster or deeper than the body needs.
explanation_zh: hyperventilation——过度通气：呼吸频率或深度超过机体所需。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The largest part of the brain, responsible for thought and movement."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「大脑：脑最大的部分，负责思维和运动。」
explanation_en: cerebrum — The largest part of the brain, responsible for thought and movement.
explanation_zh: cerebrum——大脑：脑最大的部分，负责思维和运动。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The brain region that coordinates movement and balance."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「小脑：协调运动和平衡的脑区。」
explanation_en: cerebellum — The brain region that coordinates movement and balance.
explanation_zh: cerebellum——小脑：协调运动和平衡的脑区。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The three protective membranes covering the brain and spinal cord."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脑膜：覆盖脑和脊髓的三层保护膜。」
explanation_en: meninges — The three protective membranes covering the brain and spinal cord.
explanation_zh: meninges——脑膜：覆盖脑和脊髓的三层保护膜。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Any disease of the spinal cord."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脊髓病：脊髓的任何疾病。」
explanation_en: myelopathy — Any disease of the spinal cord.
explanation_zh: myelopathy——脊髓病：脊髓的任何疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Any disease or dysfunction of the brain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脑病：脑的任何疾病或功能障碍。」
explanation_en: encephalopathy — Any disease or dysfunction of the brain.
explanation_zh: encephalopathy——脑病：脑的任何疾病或功能障碍。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Loss of the ability to understand or produce speech."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「失语症：理解或表达言语能力的丧失。」
explanation_en: aphasia — Loss of the ability to understand or produce speech.
explanation_zh: aphasia——失语症：理解或表达言语能力的丧失。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Impaired but not absent ability to use language."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「言语困难：语言能力受损但未完全丧失。」
explanation_en: dysphasia — Impaired but not absent ability to use language.
explanation_zh: dysphasia——言语困难：语言能力受损但未完全丧失。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Weakness affecting one side of the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「偏身轻瘫：一侧身体的肌力减弱。」
explanation_en: hemiparesis — Weakness affecting one side of the body.
explanation_zh: hemiparesis——偏身轻瘫：一侧身体的肌力减弱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Paralysis of all four limbs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「四肢瘫：四肢的瘫痪。」
explanation_en: quadriplegia — Paralysis of all four limbs.
explanation_zh: quadriplegia——四肢瘫：四肢的瘫痪。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Sharp pain along the course of a nerve."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经痛：沿神经走行的尖锐疼痛。」
explanation_en: neuralgia (trigeminal) — Sharp pain along the course of a nerve.
explanation_zh: neuralgia (trigeminal)——神经痛：沿神经走行的尖锐疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a nerve."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经炎：神经的炎症。」
explanation_en: neuritis — Inflammation of a nerve.
explanation_zh: neuritis——神经炎：神经的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The formation of new neurons in the brain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经发生：脑内新神经元的生成。」
explanation_en: neurogenesis — The formation of new neurons in the brain.
explanation_zh: neurogenesis——神经发生：脑内新神经元的生成。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Loss of sensation, often induced for surgery."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「麻醉：感觉的丧失，常为手术而诱导。」
explanation_en: anesthesia — Loss of sensation, often induced for surgery.
explanation_zh: anesthesia——麻醉：感觉的丧失，常为手术而诱导。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormal tingling or 'pins and needles' sensation."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「感觉异常：异常的麻刺或「针扎」样感觉。」
explanation_en: paresthesia — An abnormal tingling or 'pins and needles' sensation.
explanation_zh: paresthesia——感觉异常：异常的麻刺或「针扎」样感觉。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Sudden, violent, involuntary muscle contractions; a seizure."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「惊厥：突然、剧烈、不自主的肌肉收缩；抽搐。」
explanation_en: convulsion — Sudden, violent, involuntary muscle contractions; a seizure.
explanation_zh: convulsion——惊厥：突然、剧烈、不自主的肌肉收缩；抽搐。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A burst of abnormal electrical activity in the brain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「癫痫发作：脑内异常电活动的爆发。」
explanation_en: seizure — A burst of abnormal electrical activity in the brain.
explanation_zh: seizure——癫痫发作：脑内异常电活动的爆发。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A progressive disorder causing tremor, stiffness, and slow movement."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「帕金森病：以震颤、僵硬和动作迟缓为特征的进行性疾病。」
explanation_en: Parkinson's disease — A progressive disorder causing tremor, stiffness, and slow movement.
explanation_zh: Parkinson's disease——帕金森病：以震颤、僵硬和动作迟缓为特征的进行性疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An autoimmune disease that damages the myelin of nerves."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多发性硬化：损害神经髓鞘的自身免疫病。」
explanation_en: multiple sclerosis — An autoimmune disease that damages the myelin of nerves.
explanation_zh: multiple sclerosis——多发性硬化：损害神经髓鞘的自身免疫病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A recurrent, often one-sided, throbbing headache."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「偏头痛：反复发作、常为单侧的搏动性头痛。」
explanation_en: migraine — A recurrent, often one-sided, throbbing headache.
explanation_zh: migraine——偏头痛：反复发作、常为单侧的搏动性头痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A mild brain injury caused by a blow to the head."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脑震荡：头部受击引起的轻度脑损伤。」
explanation_en: concussion — A mild brain injury caused by a blow to the head.
explanation_zh: concussion——脑震荡：头部受击引起的轻度脑损伤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Buildup of fluid within the cavities of the brain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脑积水：脑腔内液体积聚。」
explanation_en: hydrocephalus — Buildup of fluid within the cavities of the brain.
explanation_zh: hydrocephalus——脑积水：脑腔内液体积聚。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Damage to the peripheral nerves causing numbness or pain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「周围神经病：周围神经损伤引起麻木或疼痛。」
explanation_en: neuropathy (peripheral) — Damage to the peripheral nerves causing numbness or pain.
explanation_zh: neuropathy (peripheral)——周围神经病：周围神经损伤引起麻木或疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An automatic, involuntary response to a stimulus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「反射：对刺激的自动、不自主反应。」
explanation_en: reflex — An automatic, involuntary response to a stimulus.
explanation_zh: reflex——反射：对刺激的自动、不自主反应。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A branching extension of a neuron that receives signals."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「树突：神经元接收信号的分支状突起。」
explanation_en: dendrite — A branching extension of a neuron that receives signals.
explanation_zh: dendrite——树突：神经元接收信号的分支状突起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A chemical that carries signals across a synapse."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经递质：在突触间传递信号的化学物质。」
explanation_en: neurotransmitter — A chemical that carries signals across a synapse.
explanation_zh: neurotransmitter——神经递质：在突触间传递信号的化学物质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "In a coma; in a state of deep unconsciousness."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「昏迷的：处于深度无意识状态。」
explanation_en: comatose — In a coma; in a state of deep unconsciousness.
explanation_zh: comatose——昏迷的：处于深度无意识状态。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A sensation of spinning or that one's surroundings are spinning."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「眩晕：自身或周围环境旋转的感觉。」
explanation_en: vertigo — A sensation of spinning or that one's surroundings are spinning.
explanation_zh: vertigo——眩晕：自身或周围环境旋转的感觉。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Temporary loss of consciousness; fainting."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「晕厥：短暂的意识丧失；昏厥。」
explanation_en: syncope — Temporary loss of consciousness; fainting.
explanation_zh: syncope——晕厥：短暂的意识丧失；昏厥。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Simultaneous damage to many peripheral nerves."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多发性神经病：多条周围神经同时受损。」
explanation_en: polyneuropathy — Simultaneous damage to many peripheral nerves.
explanation_zh: polyneuropathy——多发性神经病：多条周围神经同时受损。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to the blood vessels of the brain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脑血管的：与脑部血管相关的。」
explanation_en: cerebrovascular — Relating to the blood vessels of the brain.
explanation_zh: cerebrovascular——脑血管的：与脑部血管相关的。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Loss of full control of body movements."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「共济失调：身体动作协调控制的丧失。」
explanation_en: ataxia — Loss of full control of body movements.
explanation_zh: ataxia——共济失调：身体动作协调控制的丧失。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the esophagus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「食管炎：食管的炎症。」
explanation_en: esophagitis — Inflammation of the esophagus.

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the stomach and intestines, often from infection."

explanation_en: gastroenteritis — Inflammation of the stomach and intestines, often from infection.
explanation_zh: gastroenteritis——胃肠炎：胃和肠的炎症，常由感染引起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the colon (large intestine)."

explanation_en: colitis — Inflammation of the colon (large intestine).

explanation_en: proctitis — Inflammation of the rectum and anus.
explanation_zh: proctitis——直肠炎：直肠和肛门的炎症。

explanation_en: hepatomegaly (alcoholic) — Enlargement of the liver.
explanation_zh: hepatomegaly (alcoholic)——肝肿大：肝脏体积增大。

explanation_en: cholelithiasis — The presence of gallstones in the gallbladder.
explanation_zh: cholelithiasis——胆石症：胆囊内存在胆结石。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of the gallbladder."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胆囊切除术：手术切除胆囊。」
explanation_en: cholecystectomy — Surgical removal of the gallbladder.
explanation_zh: cholecystectomy——胆囊切除术：手术切除胆囊。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the pancreas."

explanation_en: pancreatitis — Inflammation of the pancreas.
explanation_zh: pancreatitis——胰腺炎：胰腺的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of part or all of the stomach."

explanation_en: gastrectomy — Surgical removal of part or all of the stomach.
explanation_zh: gastrectomy——胃切除术：手术切除部分或全部胃。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Visual examination of the colon using a flexible scope."

explanation_en: colonoscopy (screening) — Visual examination of the colon using a flexible scope.
explanation_zh: colonoscopy (screening)——结肠镜检查：用软镜观察结肠。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical incision into the abdominal wall."

explanation_en: laparotomy — Surgical incision into the abdominal wall.
explanation_zh: laparotomy——剖腹术：切开腹壁的手术。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Examination of the abdomen through a small scope."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「腹腔镜检查：通过小型内镜检查腹腔。」
explanation_en: laparoscopy — Examination of the abdomen through a small scope.
explanation_zh: laparoscopy——腹腔镜检查：通过小型内镜检查腹腔。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Vomiting of blood."

explanation_en: hematemesis — Vomiting of blood.
explanation_zh: hematemesis——呕血：呕吐出血液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Indigestion; discomfort in the upper abdomen."

explanation_en: dyspepsia — Indigestion; discomfort in the upper abdomen.

explanation_zh: ascites——腹水：腹腔内液体异常积聚。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Yellowing of the skin and eyes from excess bilirubin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「黄疸：因胆红素过多使皮肤和眼睛发黄。」
explanation_en: jaundice — Yellowing of the skin and eyes from excess bilirubin.
explanation_zh: jaundice——黄疸：因胆红素过多使皮肤和眼睛发黄。

explanation_en: constipation — Infrequent or difficult bowel movements.
explanation_zh: constipation——便秘：排便次数减少或排便困难。

explanation_en: diarrhea — Frequent loose or watery bowel movements.
explanation_zh: diarrhea——腹泻：频繁的稀便或水样便。

explanation_en: hemorrhoid — A swollen vein in the rectum or anus.
explanation_zh: hemorrhoid——痔：直肠或肛门处肿胀的静脉。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of the appendix."

explanation_en: appendectomy — Surgical removal of the appendix.
explanation_zh: appendectomy——阑尾切除术：手术切除阑尾。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Impaired absorption of nutrients from the intestine."

explanation_en: malabsorption — Impaired absorption of nutrients from the intestine.
explanation_zh: malabsorption——吸收不良：肠道对营养物质吸收障碍。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The backward flow of stomach contents into the esophagus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「反流：胃内容物倒流入食管。」
explanation_en: reflux — The backward flow of stomach contents into the esophagus.
explanation_zh: reflux——反流：胃内容物倒流入食管。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to the liver."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肝的：与肝脏相关的。」
explanation_en: hepatic — Relating to the liver.
explanation_zh: hepatic——肝的：与肝脏相关的。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the small intestine."

explanation_en: enteritis (regional) — Inflammation of the small intestine.
explanation_zh: enteritis (regional)——肠炎：小肠的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the mouth and lips."

explanation_en: stomatitis — Inflammation of the mouth and lips.
explanation_zh: stomatitis——口炎：口腔和唇的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the tongue."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「舌炎：舌的炎症。」
explanation_en: glossitis — Inflammation of the tongue.
explanation_zh: glossitis——舌炎：舌的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A lack of normal intestinal movement, blocking passage of contents."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肠梗阻（麻痹性）：肠道正常蠕动缺失，致内容物通过受阻。」

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the peritoneum lining the abdomen."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「腹膜炎：覆盖腹腔的腹膜的炎症。」
explanation_en: peritonitis — Inflammation of the peritoneum lining the abdomen.
explanation_zh: peritonitis——腹膜炎：覆盖腹腔的腹膜的炎症。

explanation_en: polyp — A small growth projecting from a mucous membrane.
explanation_zh: polyp——息肉：自黏膜突出的小赘生物。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Difficulty swallowing."

explanation_en: dysphagia (esophageal) — Difficulty swallowing.
explanation_zh: dysphagia (esophageal)——吞咽困难：吞咽时困难。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Visual examination of the stomach using a scope."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胃镜检查：用内镜观察胃。」
explanation_en: gastroscopy — Visual examination of the stomach using a scope.
explanation_zh: gastroscopy——胃镜检查：用内镜观察胃。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A break in a bone."

explanation_en: fracture — A break in a bone.
explanation_zh: fracture——骨折：骨的断裂。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Infection of bone, usually by bacteria."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「骨髓炎：骨的感染，通常由细菌引起。」
explanation_en: osteomyelitis — Infection of bone, usually by bacteria.

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Softening of bones, often from vitamin D deficiency."

explanation_en: osteomalacia — Softening of bones, often from vitamin D deficiency.
explanation_zh: osteomalacia——骨软化症：骨骼软化，常因维生素 D 缺乏所致。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of cartilage."

explanation_en: chondritis — Inflammation of cartilage.
explanation_zh: chondritis——软骨炎：软骨的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Pain in a joint."

explanation_en: arthroplasty — Surgical reconstruction or replacement of a joint.
explanation_zh: arthroplasty——关节成形术：关节的手术重建或置换。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical fusion of a joint to relieve pain."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「关节融合术：手术融合关节以缓解疼痛。」
explanation_en: arthrodesis — Surgical fusion of a joint to relieve pain.
explanation_zh: arthrodesis——关节融合术：手术融合关节以缓解疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Muscle pain."

explanation_en: myalgia — Muscle pain.
explanation_zh: myalgia——肌痛：肌肉的疼痛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of muscle tissue."

explanation_en: myositis — Inflammation of muscle tissue.
explanation_zh: myositis——肌炎：肌肉组织的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a tendon and its surrounding sheath."

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical cutting of a tendon."

explanation_en: tenotomy — Surgical cutting of a tendon.
explanation_zh: tenotomy——肌腱切断术：手术切断肌腱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the vertebrae of the spine."

explanation_en: spondylitis — Inflammation of the vertebrae of the spine.
explanation_zh: spondylitis——脊椎炎：脊柱椎骨的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Age-related degeneration of the spine."

explanation_en: spondylosis — Age-related degeneration of the spine.
explanation_zh: spondylosis——脊椎病：与年龄相关的脊柱退行性变。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical cutting of bone to realign it."

explanation_en: osteotomy — Surgical cutting of bone to realign it.
explanation_zh: osteotomy——截骨术：切开骨以重新对位的手术。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Any disease of muscle tissue."

explanation_en: myopathy (inflammatory) — Any disease of muscle tissue.
explanation_zh: myopathy (inflammatory)——肌病：肌肉组织的任何疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Complete dislocation of a joint."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脱位：关节的完全脱位。」
explanation_en: luxation — Complete dislocation of a joint.
explanation_zh: luxation——脱位：关节的完全脱位。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A partial dislocation of a joint."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「半脱位：关节的部分脱位。」
explanation_en: subluxation — A partial dislocation of a joint.
explanation_zh: subluxation——半脱位：关节的部分脱位。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An injury to a ligament from overstretching or tearing."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「扭伤：韧带因过度拉伸或撕裂而受伤。」
explanation_en: sprain — An injury to a ligament from overstretching or tearing.
explanation_zh: sprain——扭伤：韧带因过度拉伸或撕裂而受伤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An injury to a muscle or tendon from overuse or overstretching."

explanation_zh: strain——拉伤：肌肉或肌腱因过用或过度拉伸而受伤。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Excessive outward curvature of the upper spine; hunchback."

explanation_en: kyphosis — Excessive outward curvature of the upper spine; hunchback.
explanation_zh: kyphosis——脊柱后凸：上段脊柱向后过度弯曲；驼背。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Excessive inward curvature of the lower spine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脊柱前凸：下段脊柱向前过度弯曲。」
explanation_en: lordosis — Excessive inward curvature of the lower spine.
explanation_zh: lordosis——脊柱前凸：下段脊柱向前过度弯曲。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Lower-than-normal bone density, milder than osteoporosis."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「骨量减少：骨密度低于正常，程度轻于骨质疏松。」

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Breakdown of muscle tissue that releases harmful contents into blood."

explanation_zh: rhabdomyolysis——横纹肌溶解：肌肉组织分解并将有害物质释入血液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the fascia, connective tissue beneath the skin."

explanation_en: fasciitis — Inflammation of the fascia, connective tissue beneath the skin.
explanation_zh: fasciitis——筋膜炎：皮下结缔组织（筋膜）的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A band of tissue connecting bones at a joint."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「韧带：在关节处连接骨与骨的组织带。」
explanation_en: ligament — A band of tissue connecting bones at a joint.
explanation_zh: ligament——韧带：在关节处连接骨与骨的组织带。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A cord of tissue that attaches muscle to bone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肌腱：将肌肉连于骨的索状组织。」
explanation_en: tendon — A cord of tissue that attaches muscle to bone.

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The branch of medicine dealing with the musculoskeletal system."

explanation_en: orthopedics — The branch of medicine dealing with the musculoskeletal system.

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Progressive weakening and degeneration, as of muscle."

explanation_zh: dystrophy——营养不良/萎缩症：进行性的衰弱和退变，如肌肉。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A grating sound or sensation from bone or joint movement."

explanation_en: crepitus — A grating sound or sensation from bone or joint movement.
explanation_zh: crepitus——骨擦音/捻发感：骨或关节活动时的摩擦声或感觉。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A chemical messenger released by a gland into the blood."

explanation_en: hormone — A chemical messenger released by a gland into the blood.
explanation_zh: hormone——激素：腺体释放入血的化学信使。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to glands that secrete hormones into the blood."

explanation_zh: endocrine——内分泌的：与将激素分泌入血的腺体相关。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally high blood glucose."
