explanation_zh: hyperglycemia (fasting)——高血糖：血糖异常升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of glucose in the urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「糖尿：尿中出现葡萄糖。」
explanation_en: glycosuria — The presence of glucose in the urine.
explanation_zh: glycosuria——糖尿：尿中出现葡萄糖。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Excessive thirst."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多饮：异常口渴、饮水过多。」
explanation_en: polydipsia — Excessive thirst.
explanation_zh: polydipsia——多饮：异常口渴、饮水过多。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Production of abnormally large amounts of urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多尿：尿量异常增多。」
explanation_en: polyuria — Production of abnormally large amounts of urine.
explanation_zh: polyuria——多尿：尿量异常增多。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormal enlargement of the thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺肿：甲状腺的异常增大。」
explanation_en: goiter — An abnormal enlargement of the thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: goiter——甲状腺肿：甲状腺的异常增大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Enlargement of the thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺肿大：甲状腺的增大。」
explanation_en: thyromegaly — Enlargement of the thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: thyromegaly——甲状腺肿大：甲状腺的增大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of the thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺切除术：手术切除甲状腺。」
explanation_en: thyroidectomy — Surgical removal of the thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: thyroidectomy——甲状腺切除术：手术切除甲状腺。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A hormone that prepares the body for 'fight or flight'."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾上腺素：使机体准备「战或逃」反应的激素。」
explanation_en: adrenaline — A hormone that prepares the body for 'fight or flight'.
explanation_zh: adrenaline——肾上腺素：使机体准备「战或逃」反应的激素。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of an adrenal gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾上腺切除术：手术切除肾上腺。」
explanation_en: adrenalectomy — Surgical removal of an adrenal gland.
explanation_zh: adrenalectomy——肾上腺切除术：手术切除肾上腺。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Disease or enlargement of glands, especially lymph nodes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「腺病：腺体（尤其淋巴结）的疾病或肿大。」
explanation_en: adenopathy — Disease or enlargement of glands, especially lymph nodes.
explanation_zh: adenopathy——腺病：腺体（尤其淋巴结）的疾病或肿大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Excessive secretion of a substance such as a hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「分泌过多：某物质（如激素）的过度分泌。」
explanation_en: hypersecretion — Excessive secretion of a substance such as a hormone.
explanation_zh: hypersecretion——分泌过多：某物质（如激素）的过度分泌。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Deficient secretion of a substance such as a hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「分泌不足：某物质（如激素）的分泌减少。」
explanation_en: hyposecretion — Deficient secretion of a substance such as a hormone.
explanation_zh: hyposecretion——分泌不足：某物质（如激素）的分泌减少。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Enlargement of the hands, feet, and face from excess growth hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肢端肥大症：生长激素过多使手、足和面部增大。」
explanation_en: acromegaly — Enlargement of the hands, feet, and face from excess growth hormone.
explanation_zh: acromegaly——肢端肥大症：生长激素过多使手、足和面部增大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A disorder caused by prolonged exposure to high cortisol."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「库欣综合征：长期高皮质醇暴露所致的疾病。」
explanation_en: Cushing's syndrome — A disorder caused by prolonged exposure to high cortisol.
explanation_zh: Cushing's syndrome——库欣综合征：长期高皮质醇暴露所致的疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A disorder in which the adrenal glands produce too little hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「艾迪生病：肾上腺激素生成过少的疾病。」
explanation_en: Addison's disease — A disorder in which the adrenal glands produce too little hormone.
explanation_zh: Addison's disease——艾迪生病：肾上腺激素生成过少的疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Reduced hormone production by the pituitary gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「垂体功能减退：垂体激素生成减少。」
explanation_en: hypopituitarism — Reduced hormone production by the pituitary gland.
explanation_zh: hypopituitarism——垂体功能减退：垂体激素生成减少。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "All the chemical processes that maintain life in the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「代谢：维持机体生命的全部化学过程。」
explanation_en: metabolism — All the chemical processes that maintain life in the body.
explanation_zh: metabolism——代谢：维持机体生命的全部化学过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A mineral in body fluids that carries an electric charge."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「电解质：体液中带电荷的矿物质。」
explanation_en: electrolyte — A mineral in body fluids that carries an electric charge.
explanation_zh: electrolyte——电解质：体液中带电荷的矿物质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally high level of potassium in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高钾血症：血钾水平异常升高。」
explanation_en: hyperkalemia — Abnormally high level of potassium in the blood.
explanation_zh: hyperkalemia——高钾血症：血钾水平异常升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally low level of potassium in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「低钾血症：血钾水平异常偏低。」
explanation_en: hypokalemia — Abnormally low level of potassium in the blood.
explanation_zh: hypokalemia——低钾血症：血钾水平异常偏低。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally high level of calcium in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高钙血症：血钙水平异常升高。」
explanation_en: hypercalcemia — Abnormally high level of calcium in the blood.
explanation_zh: hypercalcemia——高钙血症：血钙水平异常升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having a normally functioning thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺功能正常：甲状腺功能处于正常状态。」
explanation_en: euthyroid — Having a normally functioning thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: euthyroid——甲状腺功能正常：甲状腺功能处于正常状态。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A dangerous buildup of acids when the body breaks down fat for fuel."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「酮症酸中毒：机体分解脂肪供能时酸性物质危险性积聚。」
explanation_en: ketoacidosis — A dangerous buildup of acids when the body breaks down fat for fuel.
explanation_zh: ketoacidosis——酮症酸中毒：机体分解脂肪供能时酸性物质危险性积聚。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A pancreatic hormone that raises blood glucose."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胰高血糖素：升高血糖的胰腺激素。」
explanation_en: glucagon — A pancreatic hormone that raises blood glucose.
explanation_zh: glucagon——胰高血糖素：升高血糖的胰腺激素。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Reduced response of cells to insulin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胰岛素抵抗：细胞对胰岛素的反应减弱。」
explanation_en: insulin resistance — Reduced response of cells to insulin.
explanation_zh: insulin resistance——胰岛素抵抗：细胞对胰岛素的反应减弱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The 'master gland' that controls other endocrine glands."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「垂体：调控其他内分泌腺的「主腺」。」
explanation_en: pituitary — The 'master gland' that controls other endocrine glands.
explanation_zh: pituitary——垂体：调控其他内分泌腺的「主腺」。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A brain region linking the nervous and endocrine systems."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「下丘脑：连接神经系统与内分泌系统的脑区。」
explanation_en: hypothalamus — A brain region linking the nervous and endocrine systems.
explanation_zh: hypothalamus——下丘脑：连接神经系统与内分泌系统的脑区。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to an overactive thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺功能亢进的：与甲状腺功能过度活跃相关。」
explanation_en: hyperthyroid (state) — Relating to an overactive thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: hyperthyroid (state)——甲状腺功能亢进的：与甲状腺功能过度活跃相关。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The microscopic filtering unit of the kidney."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾单位：肾脏的微观过滤单元。」
explanation_en: nephron — The microscopic filtering unit of the kidney.
explanation_zh: nephron——肾单位：肾脏的微观过滤单元。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of stones in the kidney."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾结石症：肾脏内存在结石。」
explanation_en: nephrolithiasis — The presence of stones in the kidney.
explanation_zh: nephrolithiasis——肾结石症：肾脏内存在结石。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Infection and inflammation of the kidney, often from a UTI."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾盂肾炎：肾脏的感染和炎症，常源于尿路感染。」
explanation_en: pyelonephritis — Infection and inflammation of the kidney, often from a UTI.
explanation_zh: pyelonephritis——肾盂肾炎：肾脏的感染和炎症，常源于尿路感染。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of pus (white blood cells) in the urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脓尿：尿中出现脓液（白细胞）。」
explanation_en: pyuria — The presence of pus (white blood cells) in the urine.
explanation_zh: pyuria——脓尿：尿中出现脓液（白细胞）。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Painful or difficult urination."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「排尿困难/尿痛：排尿疼痛或困难。」
explanation_en: dysuria — Painful or difficult urination.
explanation_zh: dysuria——排尿困难/尿痛：排尿疼痛或困难。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Production of an abnormally small amount of urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「少尿：尿量异常减少。」
explanation_en: oliguria — Production of an abnormally small amount of urine.
explanation_zh: oliguria——少尿：尿量异常减少。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Failure of the kidneys to produce urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「无尿：肾脏不能产生尿液。」
explanation_en: anuria — Failure of the kidneys to produce urine.
explanation_zh: anuria——无尿：肾脏不能产生尿液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The need to wake and urinate during the night."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「夜尿症：夜间需醒来排尿。」
explanation_en: nocturia — The need to wake and urinate during the night.
explanation_zh: nocturia——夜尿症：夜间需醒来排尿。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Visual examination of the bladder using a scope."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱镜检查：用内镜观察膀胱。」
explanation_en: cystoscopy (diagnostic) — Visual examination of the bladder using a scope.
explanation_zh: cystoscopy (diagnostic)——膀胱镜检查：用内镜观察膀胱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of all or part of the bladder."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱切除术：手术切除全部或部分膀胱。」
explanation_en: cystectomy — Surgical removal of all or part of the bladder.
explanation_zh: cystectomy——膀胱切除术：手术切除全部或部分膀胱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a ureter."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「输尿管炎：输尿管的炎症。」
explanation_en: ureteritis — Inflammation of a ureter.
explanation_zh: ureteritis——输尿管炎：输尿管的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the urethra."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿道炎：尿道的炎症。」
explanation_en: urethritis — Inflammation of the urethra.
explanation_zh: urethritis——尿道炎：尿道的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A kidney disorder causing heavy protein loss in urine and swelling."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾病综合征：以尿中大量蛋白丢失和水肿为特征的肾病。」
explanation_en: nephrotic syndrome — A kidney disorder causing heavy protein loss in urine and swelling.
explanation_zh: nephrotic syndrome——肾病综合征：以尿中大量蛋白丢失和水肿为特征的肾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Loss of the kidneys' ability to filter waste from the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾衰竭：肾脏过滤血液废物能力的丧失。」
explanation_en: renal failure — Loss of the kidneys' ability to filter waste from the blood.
explanation_zh: renal failure——肾衰竭：肾脏过滤血液废物能力的丧失。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Filtering the blood with a machine when the kidneys fail."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血液透析：肾衰竭时用机器过滤血液。」
explanation_en: hemodialysis — Filtering the blood with a machine when the kidneys fail.
explanation_zh: hemodialysis——血液透析：肾衰竭时用机器过滤血液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inability to control urination."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿失禁：不能控制排尿。」
explanation_en: incontinence — Inability to control urination.
explanation_zh: incontinence——尿失禁：不能控制排尿。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The branch of medicine dealing with the urinary tract."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「泌尿外科学：处理泌尿系统的医学分支。」
explanation_en: urology — The branch of medicine dealing with the urinary tract.
explanation_zh: urology——泌尿外科学：处理泌尿系统的医学分支。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The formation of stones anywhere in the urinary tract."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿石症：泌尿系统任何部位结石的形成。」
explanation_en: urolithiasis (recurrent) — The formation of stones anywhere in the urinary tract.
explanation_zh: urolithiasis (recurrent)——尿石症：泌尿系统任何部位结石的形成。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Any disease of the kidneys."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾病：肾脏的任何疾病。」
explanation_en: nephropathy — Any disease of the kidneys.
explanation_zh: nephropathy——肾病：肾脏的任何疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A surgical opening into the kidney to drain urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾造瘘术：在肾脏造口以引流尿液。」
explanation_en: nephrostomy — A surgical opening into the kidney to drain urine.
explanation_zh: nephrostomy——肾造瘘术：在肾脏造口以引流尿液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Breaking up stones using shock waves."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「碎石术：用冲击波击碎结石。」
explanation_en: lithotripsy — Breaking up stones using shock waves.
explanation_zh: lithotripsy——碎石术：用冲击波击碎结石。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of blood in the urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血尿：尿中出现血液。」
explanation_en: hematuria (gross) — The presence of blood in the urine.
explanation_zh: hematuria (gross)——血尿：尿中出现血液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tuft of capillaries in the nephron where blood is filtered."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾小球：肾单位中过滤血液的毛细血管丛。」
explanation_en: glomerulus — A tuft of capillaries in the nephron where blood is filtered.
explanation_zh: glomerulus——肾小球：肾单位中过滤血液的毛细血管丛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to the kidneys."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾的：与肾脏相关的。」
explanation_en: renal — Relating to the kidneys.
explanation_zh: renal——肾的：与肾脏相关的。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The act of urinating."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「排尿：排出尿液的动作。」
explanation_en: micturition — The act of urinating.
explanation_zh: micturition——排尿：排出尿液的动作。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A bulging of the bladder into the vaginal wall."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱膨出：膀胱向阴道壁膨出。」
explanation_en: cystocele — A bulging of the bladder into the vaginal wall.
explanation_zh: cystocele——膀胱膨出：膀胱向阴道壁膨出。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A toxic buildup of waste in the blood from kidney failure."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿毒症：肾衰竭使废物在血中蓄积的中毒状态。」
explanation_en: uremia (chronic) — A toxic buildup of waste in the blood from kidney failure.
explanation_zh: uremia (chronic)——尿毒症：肾衰竭使废物在血中蓄积的中毒状态。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An inherited disease in which cysts fill the kidneys."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多囊肾：囊肿充满肾脏的遗传性疾病。」
explanation_en: polycystic kidney — An inherited disease in which cysts fill the kidneys.
explanation_zh: polycystic kidney——多囊肾：囊肿充满肾脏的遗传性疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A drug that increases the production of urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「利尿剂：增加尿液生成的药物。」
explanation_en: diuretic — A drug that increases the production of urine.
explanation_zh: diuretic——利尿剂：增加尿液生成的药物。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tube inserted to drain urine from the bladder."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「导尿管：插入以从膀胱引流尿液的管子。」
explanation_en: urinary catheter — A tube inserted to drain urine from the bladder.
explanation_zh: urinary catheter——导尿管：插入以从膀胱引流尿液的管子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A painful, pus-filled infection of a hair follicle; a boil."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「疖：毛囊的疼痛性化脓感染；俗称疖子。」
explanation_en: furuncle — A painful, pus-filled infection of a hair follicle; a boil.
explanation_zh: furuncle——疖：毛囊的疼痛性化脓感染；俗称疖子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A fungal infection of the skin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「皮肤真菌病：皮肤的真菌感染。」
explanation_en: dermatomycosis — A fungal infection of the skin.
explanation_zh: dermatomycosis——皮肤真菌病：皮肤的真菌感染。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A thickened, horny growth of the skin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「角化病：皮肤增厚的角质性赘生。」
explanation_en: keratosis — A thickened, horny growth of the skin.
explanation_zh: keratosis——角化病：皮肤增厚的角质性赘生。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A skin cell that produces the pigment melanin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「黑素细胞：产生黑色素的皮肤细胞。」
explanation_en: melanocyte — A skin cell that produces the pigment melanin.
explanation_zh: melanocyte——黑素细胞：产生黑色素的皮肤细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A fungal infection of the nails."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲真菌病：指（趾）甲的真菌感染。」
explanation_en: onychomycosis — A fungal infection of the nails.
